petitioner_background: The petitioner sought classification as an alien of extraordinary ability under Section 203(b)(1)(A) of the Immigration and Nationality Act. No substantive details about the petitioner's field of work, nationality, or qualifications are provided in the decision because the appeal was withdrawn before any merits review. The case was originally denied by the Director of the Nebraska Service Center.
outcome_reasoning: The appeal was dismissed based on its withdrawal by counsel. On February 1, 2007, counsel requested that the appeal on behalf of the petitioner be withdrawn, and the Administrative Appeals Office dismissed the appeal on that basis without reaching the merits.
legal_citations: Section 203(b)(1)(A) of the Immigration and Nationality Act, 8 U.S.C. § 1153(b)(1)(A)
fraud_or_procedural_issues: The appeal was withdrawn by counsel on February 1, 2007, resulting in dismissal without a merits review.
